title: Comparison of Top-Down and Bottom-Up Parsing Strategies
description: A flowchart illustrating the two primary approaches to parsing a sentence, showing the distinct starting points, processes, and goals of each method.
relationships: Top-Down Parser begins from the Root Symbol (S) and applies grammar rules to expand non-terminals until it matches the Terminal Symbols
Bottom-Up Parser begins from the Terminal Symbols (words) and applies grammar rules in reverse to reduce the sequence back to the Root Symbol (S)
Both strategies aim to build a complete Parse Tree for the Input Sentence
